nodes.title: List Warehouses
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/warehouses with Authorization header. Returns array of warehouses with {id, name, warehouseTypeId, businessId}. Includes warehouse type details.

nodes.title: Create Warehouse Operation
nodes.description: POST /api/businesses/:bizId/warehouse-operations with {warehouseId, operationType, date, operationTypeId, items: [{itemName, quantity, unitPrice}]}. Validates warehouse belongs to business (returns 403 'هذا المخزن لا يتبع لهذا النشاط التجاري'). Validates operationTypeId is required (returns 400). Creates operation and updates inventory. Returns created operation.

nodes.title: List Warehouse Operations
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/warehouses/:warehouseId/operations with Authorization header. Supports query params: dateFrom, dateTo, operationType. Returns array of operations with {id, operationType, date, items[], totalAmount}.

nodes.title: Get Operation Details
nodes.description: GET /api/warehouse-operations/:id with Authorization header. Returns single operation with {id, warehouseId, operationType, date, items: [{itemName, quantity, unitPrice}], totalAmount}. Returns 404 if not found.

nodes.title: Get Warehouse Inventory
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/warehouses/:warehouseId/inventory with Authorization header. Returns current inventory items with {itemName, totalQuantity, avgUnitPrice, totalValue}. Filters out ghost items (quantity=0 or empty names).

nodes.title: Get Inventory Summary
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/inventory-summary?warehouseIds=1,2,3 with Authorization header. Returns aggregated inventory across multiple warehouses. Filters out ghost items. Returns 400 if warehouseIds not provided.

nodes.title: Get Operations Summary
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/warehouse-operations-summary?dateFrom=YYYY-MM-DD&dateTo=YYYY-MM-DD with Authorization header. Returns summary of warehouse operations grouped by type. Validates date format using regex (rejects SQL injection). Returns 400 with 'تنسيق التاريخ غير صالح' for invalid dates.

nodes.title: Manage Warehouse Types
nodes.description: CRUD for warehouse types. POST /api/businesses/:bizId/warehouse-types with {name, description?}. PUT /api/warehouse-types/:id with {name?, description?}. DELETE /api/warehouse-types/:id. GET /api/businesses/:bizId/warehouse-types returns all types.
